summary: Chrome side-panel gesture browsing extension MVP.
scope: four-direction discrete swipe detector with cooldown and rearming
Chrome Manifest V3 side panel and active-tab action bridge
generic page scrolling and ArrowLeft or ArrowRight page actions
editable-field protection and deterministic gesture test page
separate web demo and extension production builds
validation: npm test (20 tests, including 10 swipes per direction and two-minute jitter simulation)
real Chromium gesture test page inspection
notes: dist-extension is generated and intentionally not tracked.
Synthetic keyboard events are not trusted and may require site-specific adapters.
Final physical-hand acceptance remains a user test on the target MacBook.
